attempted_draft_field_update.field: Number of Full Time Equivalent (FTE) employees
attempted_draft_field_update.evidence_basis: Prior saved IFS finance profile and Aureon ledger records show full-time employees = 1 from the 2026 company accounts/iXBRL evidence basis.
methods: Clicked Change from the Project Impact review page
Typed the value in the visible Salesforce/GOV.UK input
Blurred the input and clicked Continue
Repeated with a slower select-all, type, tab, Continue path
attempted_draft_field_update.readback_after_continue: The survey returned to 'Check your answers before sending your details' and the FTE answer remained blank.

project_impact_review_readback.why_not_submitted: The final survey Submit button was not pressed because required company, financial, forecast, readiness, and training values were still blank or not persisting on provider readback.

finance_readback.reason_not_completed: No verified UK-Switzerland partner budget, work-package split, eligible-cost basis, PAYE labour cost basis, or partner commitment evidence is present in the current Aureon ledger.

remaining_required_before_final_submit: Research institution or valid waiver evidence
R&A project finance cost lines with evidence
Project Impact values that persist on provider readback
Award terms acceptance after finance and impact completion
Final review and submit action-time confirmation

controls: IFS credentials were used only at runtime; no password or secret is stored in this artifact.
No Project Impact Submit button was pressed.
No final IFS submission was attempted.
No partner budget, finance value, readiness level, or turnover forecast was fabricated.
